name: adpages-ghost-newsletter-landing-kit
description: Local-only Ghost newsletter landing-page kit with UTM links, theme snippets, Open Graph checks, and QA checklists.

scripts.check: node --check src/ghost-kit.mjs && node --check bin/adpages-ghost-kit.mjs && node --check scripts/check.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke.mjs && node scripts/check.mjs
